title: Space Oddity
why_this_song: Space Oddity by David Bowie (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Ground control to Major Tom"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Ground control to Major Tom"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Ground control to Major Tom"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Planet Earth is blue, and there's nothing I can do"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Can you hear me, Major Tom?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Take your protein pills and put your helmet on
Ground control to Major Tom (ten, nine, eight, seven)
Can you hear me, Major Tom?
Can you hear me, Major Tom?
Can you hear me, Major Tom?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "major" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "major" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ground" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ground" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Space Oddity" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Space Oddity"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask David Bowie one question about "Space Oddity", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para David Bowie sobre "Space Oddity", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Space Oddity" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Space Oddity" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
